race.comment: LOWESTOFT (7) is coming off a dominant win here having broken her maiden by 3.5 lengths, coming right away after tracking the speed. Put up a solid number there and can go on with it now in what looks a nice option. JOIN THE QUE (2) smashed his rivals by 7.5 lengths when backed into $1.35 at Stawell last time out, coming right away to win his maiden on speed at his fifth start. Beat very little there but can measure up. HOLLERASAUROUS (3) is a lightly raced gelding who won narrowly on debut, failing to back that performance up in a deeper race at Cranbourne last time. He can bounce right back. CRYSTANADO (5) is racing consistently and has each way claims.
